cues.label: The ask
cues.headline: All words starting with a prefix
cues.narration: Autocomplete returns every stored word that begins with the given prefix.

cues.label: Phase 1: walk
cues.headline: Reach the prefix node
cues.narration: Walk the prefix from the root; if a character is missing, there are no completions, return empty.

cues.label: Anchor
cues.headline: Everything below is a completion
cues.narration: Standing on the prefix node, every word in its subtree begins with the prefix, and nothing outside does.

cues.label: Phase 2: DFS
cues.headline: Record flagged nodes
cues.narration: Depth-first through the subtree; at each end-of-word node record the accumulated string.

cues.label: Skip the rest
cues.headline: cat and cap never visited
cues.narration: Words under ca but not under car are never looked at — the walk to the prefix skipped them.

cues.label: The bug
cues.headline: Emit only flagged nodes
cues.narration: Recording every visited node would invent the prefix ca as a word; record only end-of-word nodes.
